title: CBIC Mandates Time-Bound Processing for RoDTEP and RoSCTL Scrolls!
content:
# CBIC Mandates Time-Bound Processing for RoDTEP and RoSCTL Scrolls!

Ek important update hai. Government ne RoDTEP (Remission of Duties and Taxes on Exported Products) aur RoSCTL (Rebate of State and Central Taxes and Levies) scrolls ke time-bound processing ke liye instructions announce kiye hain. This is a crucial step to streamline export incentive disbursements.

Here are the key details:

*   The Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) has issued **Instruction No. 05/2026-Customs dated April 23, 2026**.
*   This instruction addresses significant delays in the generation of RoSCTL scrolls and the disbursal of rightful claims, which were causing undue hardship to exporters.
*   The CBIC has now mandated strict adherence to a time-bound framework.
*   Customs authorities are directed to comply with a **three-day timeline for the generation of both RoDTEP and RoSCTL scrolls**, aligning with the existing instructions for duty drawback credits.
*   The primary aim is to ensure administrative efficiency, timely disbursal of export incentives, and to reduce financial stress on exporters.
